title: DIY Accounting GL-aligned Transaction Lines
description: A single financial transaction record. Field names adapted from XBRL Global Ledger Taxonomy Framework 2015 (gl-cor, gl-bus, gl-muc, gl-taf modules). Reference: http://www.xbrl.org/int/gl/2015-03-25/gl-framework-REC-2015-03-25.html

entryNumber.description: gl-cor:entryNumber — Unique transaction identifier within this book

lineNumber.description: gl-cor:lineNumber — Line within a multi-line journal entry (Company Accounts only)

sourceJournalID.description: gl-cor:sourceJournalID — Which journal/daybook this belongs to

enteredBy.description: gl-cor:enteredBy — User or system that entered the transaction

accountMainID.description: gl-cor:accountMainID — Nominal code from chart of accounts in book.toml

lineItemComment.description: Adapted from gl-cor:detailComment — Description of goods/services

taxCode.description: gl-taf — UK VAT code: S=Standard, R=Reduced, Z=Zero, E=Exempt, OS=Outside Scope, RC=Reverse Charge, NA=Not Applicable

taxPointDate.description: gl-taf:taxPointDate — VAT tax point if different from postingDate

diya-gl:bankCode.description: diya-gl: extension — Bank receipt/payment code. Receipt: BC=opening balance, DR=debtor receipt, CR=creditor refund, K=capital introduced, RV=revenue (interest), DL=directors loan in, X=transfer in. Payment: BC=closing adjustment, CR=creditor payment, DR=debtor refund, W=wages, B=bank charges, J=journal, RP=HMRC payment (PAYE/VAT/CT), DL=directors loan out, X=transfer out, DV=dividend.

diya-gl:bankAccountID.description: diya-gl: extension — Bank account code from book.toml accounts.bank (e.g. 1200=current, 1210=savings). Identifies which bank workbook this transaction belongs to.

diya-gl:employeeID.description: diya-gl: extension — Employee identifier matching employees[] in book.toml. Used for payroll lines (sourceJournalID=payroll).

diya-gl:grossPay.description: diya-gl: extension — Gross pay for this payroll period. Payroll lines only.

diya-gl:incomeTax.description: diya-gl: extension — PAYE income tax deducted. Payroll lines only.

diya-gl:employeeNI.description: diya-gl: extension — Employee National Insurance deducted. Payroll lines only.

diya-gl:employerNI.description: diya-gl: extension — Employer National Insurance contribution. Payroll lines only.

diya-gl:netPay.description: diya-gl: extension — Net pay (gross - tax - employee NI). Payroll lines only.

diya-gl:cisDeduction.description: diya-gl: extension — CIS deduction amount withheld from sub-contractor payment. Purchases lines with CIS sub-contractors only.

diya-gl:cisRate.description: diya-gl: extension — CIS deduction rate (0.20=20% standard, 0.30=30% higher, 0=gross payment). CIS lines only.
